authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update license URL from HTTP to HTTPS in the Maven wrapper batch script.
Rename 'Maven2' to 'Maven' in the script header comment to reflect modern naming.
Fix typo 'key stroke' to 'keystroke' in environment variable documentation.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.before: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a key stroke before ending
authorization/mvnw.cmd.after: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Add command window title setting and fix typo in echo comment.
authorization/mvnw.cmd.before: @REM enable echoing my setting MAVEN_BATCH_ECHO to 'on'

authorization/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Remove early definition of MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS to be defined later with standardized retrieval.
Fix WRAPPER_JAR path to use MAVEN_PROJECTBASEDIR for correct resolution.
Add logic to download maven-wrapper.jar if missing, supporting projects that don't check in binary data.
Move MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS definition to after wrapper download logic for standardized CLI arg retrieval.
Update Maven launch command to use %MAVEN_CONFIG% and %* instead of %MAVEN_CMD_LINE_ARGS%.

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Update license URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Modernize shell script syntax by replacing backticks with $() for command substitution.
Simplify Darwin (macOS) JAVA_HOME detection logic to use /usr/libexec/java_home primarily.
Add Maven Wrapper auto-download functionality to fetch maven-wrapper.jar if missing.
Refactor find_maven_basedir to accept a path argument and add Solaris workaround.
authorization/mvnw.after:
if [ -z "$1" ]; then
    echo "Path not specified to find_maven_basedir"
    return 1
  fi

authorization/mvnw.general_idea: Move Cygwin path conversion to Windows format to after wrapper download to ensure correct paths.
authorization/mvnw.before:
# For Cygwin, switch paths to Windows format before running java
if $cygwin; then
authorization/mvnw.after:
# For Cygwin, switch paths to Windows format before running java
if $cygwin; then

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-boot-starter-security dependency as it is now managed differently or redundant with OAuth2 starters.
authorization/pom.xml.why_exists: Redundant or conflicting with new OAuth2 auto-configuration setup.

authorization/pom.xml.general_idea: Add micrometer-registry-prometheus dependency for metrics export.
Add spring-cloud-starter-zipkin dependency for distributed tracing.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor dependency for IDE metadata generation.
Exclude junit-vintage-engine from spring-boot-starter-test to enforce JUnit 5 usage.
Remove explicit packaging element as jar is the default.
Remove project.build.sourceEncoding property as it is default in Spring Boot 2.x parent.
Remove custom Spring snapshot and milestone repositories as they are no longer needed for stable releases.
Update groupId from com.example to lol.maki.dev.
Update project description from 'Demo project for Spring Boot' to 'Authorization Server'.
Reformat XML indentation from tabs to spaces.

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Remove Thymeleaf XML namespace declaration from the HTML root element.
Update meta tags to include viewport and X-UA-Compatible settings for modern browser compatibility.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.after:
<meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="ie=edge">

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Change the page title from 'OAuth2 SSO Demo' to 'Index'.
Replace UIkit CSS framework with PUI (Patternfly UI) CSS framework.
Rewrite the body content to display user account details and use PUI styling classes instead of UIkit.
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.before:
Demo

Go back to UI
authorization/src/main/resources/templat.after:
Welcome, [[${account.fullName}]]!



Family Name Given Name Email
[[${account.familyName}]] [[${account.givenName}]] [[${account.email}]]

authorization/src/main/resources/templat.general_idea: Replace UIkit CSS framework with PUI (Pivotal UI) components for the login page styling.
Update HTML structure and form fields to match PUI component requirements, changing username to email and adjusting layout classes.
Add standard meta tags for viewport and compatibility to the HTML head.
Remove Thymeleaf namespace declaration from the html tag, likely relying on classpath detection or simplified configuration.
Change Thymeleaf action attribute syntax from th:action to data-th-action.
Remove error and logout message display blocks from the login form.

Login failed ...

Logout succeeded.
